data.title: Queue improvements: CLAUDECODE= env, concurrency, progress tracking
data.description:
## Parent: #1

## Summary

Queue improvements needed for the extraction pipeline to work at scale.

## Items

### 1\. CLAUDECODE= env bypass

When `queue run` executes inside a Claude Code session, `claude -p` jobs fail with "cannot launch nested session." Queue runner should unset `CLAUDECODE` env var automatically when running jobs.

### 2\. Concurrency control

Currently sequential. For ollama jobs, parallel processing is fine (model handles batching). Add `--concurrency N` flag.

```bash
queue run --concurrency 4
```

### 3\. Progress tracking

For large backfills (thousands of jobs), need visibility:

* `queue status` — pending/running/completed/failed counts
* Progress bar or % complete during `queue run`
* ETA based on average job duration

### 4\. Job metadata

Track extraction type, conversation ID, and model used per job. Enables:

* `queue list --type decisions`
* `queue retry --type summaries`
* Stats on model performance per extraction type

### 5\. Dead letter queue

After max_attempts, jobs go to a dead letter queue instead of disappearing. Allows inspection and manual retry.
